title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capital Float Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
